title: geniostoma rupestre var. rupestre
intro: Geniostoma rupestre var. rupestre is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae, native to New Caledonia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Geniostoma rupestre var. rupestre include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically harvested for its leaves and flowers, which can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
